name: Oracle Taleo Enterprise Recruiting API
what_it_does: Oracle Taleo Enterprise Edition REST API for enterprise talent acquisition, applicant tracking, and onboarding. Enables AI agents to manage job requisition creation and approval workflow for enterprise recruiting operations, handle candidate application processing and status management for applicant tracking automation, access interview scheduling and recruiter coordination for hiring workflow, retrieve offer management and approval workflow for talent acquisition operations, manage new hire onboarding and I-9 verification for employee initiation, handle OFCCP-compliant adverse action tracking for affirmative action compliance, access candidate sourcing and pipeline analytics for recruiting intelligence, retrieve offer acceptance and background check initiation for pre-employment screening, manage recruiter workload and queue management for talent acquisition operations, and integrate Taleo with HRIS, background check, and onboarding platforms.
use_cases: Processing applications from recruiting operations agents
Scheduling interviews from talent acquisition agents
Managing offers from recruiting workflow agents
Tracking OFCCP data from compliance agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise ATS complexity
Staffing agencies requiring agency-specific ATS features
Organizations moving away from legacy Oracle HCM
best_when: A large enterprise with Oracle HCM ecosystem wanting AI agents to automate job requisition management, candidate pipeline tracking, interview coordination, offer workflow, OFCCP compliance tracking, and new hire onboarding in Taleo.
avoid_when: OFCCP ADVERSE ACTION RECORD REQUIREMENTS: Automated candidate disposition in Taleo must apply OFCCP-compliant job-related adverse action reason codes; automated rejection without documented OFCCP-compliant reason creates AAP audit finding and OFCCP investigation risk. EEO/AAP SELF-IDENTIFICATION TIMING: Automated EEO and voluntary veteran/disability self-identification invitations must be sent at pre-offer stage; automated post-offer invitation creates OFCCP compliance timing violation. Oracle Fusion migration risk — Oracle is migrating Taleo customers to Oracle Recruiting Cloud (ORC) on Oracle Fusion HCM; API investment in Taleo may be reduced; automated workflows built on Taleo face migration requirement to Oracle Recruiting Cloud. Background check adverse action process — automated background check adverse action using Taleo must follow FCRA pre-adverse action and adverse action notice process before disqualifying candidates.

auth.notes: Oracle Taleo uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON/XML. Austin, Texas HQ (Oracle Corp, NYSE: ORCL). Taleo founded 2002; Oracle acquired 2012. Enterprise ATS market leader for large corporations. 5,000+ enterprise customers. Oracle is migrating Taleo to Oracle Recruiting Cloud on Fusion HCM. Competes with iCIMS, Workday Recruiting, and SAP SuccessFactors for enterprise talent acquisition.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; part of Oracle HCM Cloud pricing
pricing.notes: Austin TX. Oracle NYSE:ORCL. Taleo acquired 2012. 5,000+ enterprise customers. Migrating to Oracle Recruiting Cloud. Enterprise per-user subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in Oracle HCM developer documentation

known_agent_gotchas: ORACLE RECRUITING CLOUD MIGRATION RISK: Oracle is actively migrating Taleo customers to Oracle Recruiting Cloud (ORC) on Fusion HCM; new Taleo API integrations face migration requirement; validate current Taleo end-of-life timeline with Oracle account team before new integration investment

OFCCP ADVERSE ACTION CODE ACCURACY: Automated candidate disposition must apply OFCCP job-related disposition reason codes specific to each position's requirements; automated rejection with generic or vague reason codes creates AAP audit finding and OFCCP investigation exposure

No webhooks — candidate status change, offer acceptance, and onboarding event notifications require polling; no push notification for recruiting workflow events; implement scheduled polling aligned with recruiting operations cadence

EEO self-identification pre-offer timing — automated EEO and voluntary veteran/disability self-identification surveys must be sent before conditional offer; automated post-offer invitation timing creates OFCCP compliance timing violation in AA program

FCRA pre-adverse action for background check — automated background check adverse action in Taleo must send pre-adverse action notice with copy of report and consumer rights summary; automated disqualification without FCRA pre-adverse action process creates consumer rights violation

Legacy API XML format — some Taleo API endpoints use XML response format rather than JSON; automated integrations must handle both XML and JSON depending on API endpoint; verify response format for each endpoint before building parsers
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise ATS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Candidate and recruiting data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise ATS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Candidate and hiring data.
